---
title: "Device mapping summary"
format: docx
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(omopgenerics)
library(dplyr)
library(OmopSketch)
library(CohortCharacteristics)
library(ggplot2)
library(visOmopResults)
library(flextable)
library(tidyr)

res <- importSummarisedResult(here::here("rawData"))
```

## Summary of device exposure table

```{r}
tableClinicalRecords(res, type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")
```

\newpage

## Trends in device records over time

```{r}
plotTrend(res) + 
  ggtitle("Trend in device exposure records") +
  ylim(c(0, NA))
```

\newpage

## Device concept IDs

```{r}
res |> 
  filterSettings(result_type == "summarise_table") |> 
  filterSettings(stringr::str_detect(group, "source")) |> 
  tidy() |> 
  filter(!is.na(count)) |> 
  filter(variable_name == "number records") |> 
  mutate(missing_uid = if_else(is.na(unique_device_id), "missing", "non_missing")) |> 
  summarise(tot = sum(count),
            .by = c(device_concept_id, device_concept_id_name, missing_uid)) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "missing_uid", values_from = "tot") |> 
  dplyr::mutate(missing = replace_na(missing, 0),
                non_missing = replace_na(non_missing, 0)) |> 
  mutate(
    number_of_records = missing + non_missing,
    percentage_with_unique_identifier = paste0((non_missing / number_of_records)*100, "%")
  )  |> 
  select(device_concept_id, device_concept_id_name,
         number_of_records, 
         percentage_with_unique_identifier) |> 
  arrange(desc(number_of_records)) |> 
  visTable(type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")
```

\newpage

## Unique identifiers per device concept ID

```{r}
uid <- res |> 
  filterSettings(result_type == "summarise_table") |> 
  filterSettings(stringr::str_detect(group, "source")) |> 
  tidy() |> 
  filter(!is.na(unique_device_id)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(count)) |> 
  filter(variable_name == "number records") |> 
  arrange(desc(count))

uid |> 
  # filter(device_concept_id == "45758380") |> 
  arrange(desc(count)) |> 
  select(device_concept_id, device_concept_id_name,
         unique_device_id,
         device_source_value, count) |> 
  visTable(groupColumn = c("device_concept_id_name", "device_concept_id"), 
           type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")

```

\newpage

## Characterisation of top 10 devices

```{r}
c_order <- res |> 
  filterSettings(result_type == "summarise_characteristics") |> 
  filter(variable_name == "Number records") |> 
  tidy() |> 
  arrange(desc(count)) |> 
  pull(cohort_name)

res |> 
  filterSettings(result_type == "summarise_characteristics") |> 
  mutate(group_level = factor(group_level, levels = c_order)) |> 
  arrange(group_level) |> 
  mutate(group_level = as.character(group_level)) |> 
  tableCharacteristics(header = c("cdm_name"), 
                     groupColumn = "cohort_name", 
           type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")
```

\newpage

```{r}
res |> 
  filterSettings(table_name == "procedure_occurrence") |> 
  filter(variable_level == "0 to 0") |> 
  mutate(group_level = factor(group_level, levels = c_order)) |> 
  arrange(group_level) |> 
  mutate(group_level = as.character(group_level)) |> 
  tableTopLargeScaleCharacteristics(, 
           type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")|>
  set_caption(caption = "Most common procedure codes seen on same day as device exposure")
```

\newpage

```{r}
res |> 
  filterSettings(table_name == "condition_occurrence") |> 
  filter(variable_level == "-7 to 7") |> 
  mutate(group_level = factor(group_level, levels = c_order)) |> 
  arrange(group_level) |> 
  mutate(group_level = as.character(group_level)) |> 
  tableTopLargeScaleCharacteristics(type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")|>
  set_caption(caption = "Most common condition occurrence codes seen on same day as device exposure")
```

\newpage

```{r}
res |> 
  filterSettings(table_name == "drug_exposure") |> 
  filter(variable_level == "-7 to 7") |> 
  mutate(group_level = factor(group_level, levels = c_order)) |> 
  arrange(group_level) |> 
  mutate(group_level = as.character(group_level)) |> 
  tableTopLargeScaleCharacteristics(, 
           type = "flextable") |>
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")|>
  set_caption(caption = "Most common drug exposure codes seen on same day as device exposure")
```
